title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Learn the principles of user-centered design. Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs for web and mobile apps.

title: Digital Marketing Strategy
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, and analytics. Build a complete digital marketing strategy for any business.

title: Data Science with Python
description: Master data analysis, visualization, and machine learning using Python, Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn.

title: Business Communication Skills
description: Improve your professional communication, presentation skills, and business writing. Perfect for career growth.

title: Mobile App Development with React Native
description: Build cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android using React Native. Deploy your first app to app stores.
